name: Task
description: A work item scoped to a single Project via scopedBy: reads are fail-closed on the X-Aperture-Scope-Project header (403 without it). This is partitioning, not authorization — any authenticated caller may name any project scope value; pair scopedBy with an ABAC policy (see docs/guide/manifests.md) for real per-scope access control.

project.description: Project this task belongs to — also the scopedBy field
